name: Control Plane Tenant Safety Dry Run
description: Report-only Roadmap N profile for tenant isolation, RBAC, token scope, and audit immutability. It records the validation contract without mutating users, roles, tenants, tokens, or audit records.

evidence_scope: RBAC allow/deny matrix for analyst, responder, admin, and auditor roles
tenant boundary checks for alert, event, agent, response, and export APIs
token scope and expiry checks for CLI/API credentials
audit persistence and immutability checks for sensitive control-plane actions
promotion_requires: executed API tests proving cross-tenant reads and writes are denied
executed RBAC tests proving destructive response requires explicit permission and approval
token scope tests for expired, revoked, least-privilege, and over-scoped tokens
audit records with actor, tenant, target, action, decision, reason, and correlation id

claim_boundary: Dry-run control-plane safety contract only. It makes Roadmap N scorecard-mappable without claiming executed RBAC, tenant isolation, token, or audit enforcement.

tests.name: Tenant RBAC Deny Matrix Report Only
tests.fallback_command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "[pscustomobject]@{ Capability='rbac'; Roles=@('analyst','responder','admin','auditor'); SensitiveActions=@('kill_process','network_isolate','delete_file','export_events','change_policy'); DenyByDefault=$true; RuntimeEffect='none_report_only' } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress"

tests.name: Cross Tenant API Contract Report Only
tests.fallback_command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "[pscustomobject]@{ Capability='tenant_isolation'; ProtectedResources=@('agents','events','alerts','responses','exports','audit'); RequiredDecision='deny_cross_tenant'; RuntimeEffect='none_report_only' } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress"

tests.name: Token Scope Contract Report Only
tests.fallback_command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "[pscustomobject]@{ Capability='token_scope'; TokenStates=@('valid_least_privilege','expired','revoked','over_scoped','wrong_tenant'); RequiredAudit=$true; RuntimeEffect='none_report_only' } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress"
